meta.title: LEDU - Web Developer | Website & E-shop Creation
meta.description: I'm a web developer and designer specializing in creating modern, high-performance websites and e-shops. Custom work tailored to your business.

vyvoj.title: Web Development
vyvoj.description: If you have high demands for your website, you're in the right place. You can expect a well-thought-out, intuitive, and visually attractive website that's always tailored for online marketing and designed specifically for your target audience.

features.title: Stability
features.description: When developing websites, I focus on using modern yet proven technologies that are reliable and trustworthy.

features.title: Responsiveness
features.description: Whether your visitors view your website on a mobile device, tablet, computer, or any other device, the content adapts seamlessly to the screen size.

features.title: Speed
features.description: Research has shown that 75% of customers rarely return to pages that take longer than 4 seconds to load.

features.title: Quality
features.description: For top-tier work, I use the latest technologies and methods. Everything is thoroughly tested and continuously improved.

eshop.title: E-Shop / E-Commerce
eshop.subtitle: Secure and scalable e-commerce solutions
eshop.description: Setting up online sales may sound daunting and expensive, but it doesn't have to be. I can advise you on which e-commerce solution will best fit your budget and business needs.

design.title: Web Design
design.subtitle: You have the vision, I bring it to life.
design.description: I believe that attention to detail is paramount when designing websites. Achieving the perfect balance between functionality and aesthetics means your website will not only look beautiful but also drive users to conversion.

sprava.title: Website Maintenance
sprava.subtitle: Hassle-free maintenance packages from 1000 CZK
sprava.description: Securing your WordPress website is a time-consuming task, so I'm happy to do all the work for you.

marketing.title: Marketing
marketing.subtitle: Internet advertising
marketing.description: Reach thousands of potential customers quickly through search engines and popular portals.

features.title: PPC Advertising
features.description: I'll set up effective campaigns in PPC systems like Google Ads and Sklik.

features.title: SEO
features.description: I optimize your website to ensure it's easily indexed by search engines.

features.title: Social Media
features.description: Build stronger relationships with your customers through social media engagement.

testimonials.text: Duy is a professional in his field. We came to him with minimal knowledge and a limited budget. He explained everything clearly and came up with a solution that fit both our budget and our business needs. The collaboration was seamless and everything went smoothly. He has experience, knows what's current, and gives great advice. If a client insists on something, he has no problem implementing changes. The result is an excellent website. I definitely recommend his work, and when we plan to expand our services, Duy will be our first choice. Thank you!
testimonials.author: ZUZANA Z.

testimonials.text: "The most impressive aspect is his proactiveness. He brings ideas to the table and is very experienced. I'd say Duy deserves a 10 out of 10."
testimonials.author: MIREK

testimonials.text: Duy is a professional designer and developer. Working with him was a pleasure - his designs are creative, modern, and always meet the requirements. Communication was smooth and the results exceeded our expectations.
testimonials.author: FILIP J.

testimonials.text: Great collaboration! Duy understands what he does and knows how to apply it to real projects. The website he created for us looks fantastic and works great on all devices.
testimonials.author: DENIS

testimonials.text: The redesign of our website exceeded all expectations. Revenue increased significantly after the launch. Duy understands that a website is not just a business card, but a sales tool.
testimonials.author: TOMÁŠ K.

testimonials.text: We needed a website with a reservation system and multiple language versions. Duy delivered everything quickly and without complications. Our guests often tell us we have a beautiful website.
testimonials.author: MARTIN P.

testimonials.text: Professional approach from start to finish. The e-shop works flawlessly, the design is elegant, and customers find it easy to navigate. I definitely recommend.
testimonials.author: PETRA N.

testimonials.text: Duy created a website that perfectly represents our company. Communication was fast, proposals were accurate, and the result exceeded expectations. We'll gladly work with him again.
testimonials.author: DAGMAR C.

testimonials.text: The collaboration on our law firm's website went smoothly. Duy understands what the client needs and can turn it into a modern and functional website.
testimonials.author: DAVID N.

testimonials.text: As a photographer, I needed a website that showcases my work in the best light. Duy nailed it — fast, creative, and with an eye for detail.
testimonials.author: LUCIE S.

testimonials.text: Website and logo in one place. Duy has an eye for design and the technical skills to make everything work. Our guests in Vietnam love the website.
testimonials.author: TRANG L.

testimonials.text: We were looking for someone who could handle an e-shop with a payment gateway and nice design. Duy delivered both and even helped with marketing. A great professional.
testimonials.author: JAN M.

aboutMe.heading: ABOUT ME
aboutMe.bio: I have been professionally creating complete websites or parts of them for six years. I gained experience at large corporations where I worked as a coder/front-end developer, programmer, and designer. Later, I specialized in PPC advertising with expertise in web analytics and SEO. I now use these experiences as a freelancer in Prague.

faqItems.question: Why choose a freelance web designer?
faqItems.answer: A freelance web designer can offer great value at a reasonable price compared to agencies while providing top-quality websites and a more personal approach.

faqItems.question: What areas do you cover?
faqItems.answer: I've been working remotely for years with businesses of all sizes. I've worked with clients based in Prague, Brno, London, Saigon, Da Nang, Bruchsal, and Berlin.

faqItems.question: What's the difference between a freelance web designer and a freelance web developer?
faqItems.answer: A web designer designs how things will look and feel, usually in applications like Figma or Sketch. A developer then implements that design into an interactive form in a web browser. I have years of experience and knowledge in both areas, so I can be a great asset for businesses wanting to bridge the gap between design and development.

faqItems.question: What services do you offer?
faqItems.answer: PPC advertising, SEO, Branding and corporate identity, Wireframes and prototyping, User experience design (UX), User interface design (UI), Mobile app design, Banners and social media content, Animations, Print materials, Coding, Programming, Web maintenance, E-shops

oMne.title: About Me | LEDU
oMne.heading: ABOUT ME
bio: I create thoughtful, clear, graphically interesting, and unique websites built on the WordPress CMS platform.
I have been professionally creating complete websites or parts of them for six years.

I gained experience at large corporations where I worked as a coder/front-end developer (HTML, CSS, JS, WordPress) at Infonia, MagicWare, and Web4All. I now use this experience as a freelancer creating presentation websites and e-shops built on the WordPress CMS platform, which is currently my main focus.
I was born in Prague and have lived here my entire life.
In my free time, I enjoy working out outdoors, photography, and hiking in the mountains.

values.title: QUALITY
values.description: I use the latest technologies and methods for top-tier work. Everything is thoroughly tested and improved until the result is perfect.

values.title: EXPERTISE
values.description: I have deep knowledge and experience in web development and design. I continuously educate myself and stay up-to-date with the latest trends.

values.title: COMMUNICATION
values.description: I believe in open and transparent communication. I regularly keep you informed about project progress and am always available for your questions.
